summary: Auto-focus, select-all, min-order-size gating, contextual placeholder, limit-mode auto-focus, Enter-blocked-when-disabled (empty + below-min), and Enter-to-submit with UI-success proof (redirect to market detail + live position visible) are all exercised by the live recipe (40/40 nodes passed).

standalone.label: Trade screen with empty size shows disabled 'Minimum order size $10' button and 'min $10' placeholder
Entering a valid amount ($15) enables the Open Long ETH button
Switching to limit order type auto-focuses the limit price input
AC7 — Enter from focused amount input ($15) submits the order and redirects to the market detail page with the new ETH position visible
